introSection: Junior Coaster is a steel roller coaster currently located at Gero Land in Cairo, Cairo, Egypt.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Junior Coaster is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.

fullText:
Junior Coaster is a steel roller coaster currently located at Gero Land in Cairo, Cairo, Egypt.

Junior Coaster is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.
